    Select 2–4 batch codes above and click Compare to overlay their growth trajectories.
    ABW GROWTH (g) — Days of Culture
    X = DOC day · Y = Avg Body Weight (g)
    CUMULATIVE FCR — Days of Culture
    X = DOC day · Y = Cumulative Feed Conversion Ratio
    SURVIVAL RATE (%) — Days of Culture
    X = DOC day · Y = Survival % from stocking

    🔧 PROJECTION SETUP
    📈
    No projection yet
    Select a cage or batch above and click Run Projection
    📈 Growth Curve — ABW over time (g)
    🍽️ Daily Feed Projection (kg/day)
    📅 Growth Milestones
    📦 Feed Usage by Period
    ℹ️ Assumptions: ADG is calculated from sampling history (if 2+ samples exist) or from overall DOC growth. Mortality continues at current daily rate. Feed calculated using actual Murrel feed chart (2 feeding sessions/day at optimal temp range). All values are projections — actual results depend on water quality, feeding management, and health.

    👥 USER ROLES

    Set role for each user email. Workers can enter data but cannot start/close batches or delete records.

    📦 BATCH MANAGEMENT

    Close completed batches or delete accidentally created ones.

    ✏️ EDIT CAGE DATA

    Correct wrong entries. Select cage to edit its current values.

    ⚡ BULK CAGE ENTRY

    Apply same ABW, feed, or mortality to ALL cages in a batch at once.

    📊 BATCH COMPARISON

    Compare performance of two batches side by side.

    ⚙ WATER QUALITY THRESHOLDS (per pond)

    Set custom alert thresholds for each pond. Alerts fire when readings go outside these limits.

    📐 CAGE DIMENSIONS (for stocking density)

    Enter cage size once. Stocking density (kg/m³) will auto-calculate for all cages.

    ⚠ Default thresholds: Warn 15 kg/m³ · Danger 25 kg/m³.

    🏭 FEED INVENTORY

    Track feed stock per size. Deducted automatically when cage data is saved. Alerts when stock is low.

    🔗 OPS–FINANCE SYNC

    Automatically bridge feed costs and harvest invoices from Operations to the Finance module.

    Auto-sync feed costs to P&L
    Each feed entry creates a "Feed Cost" expense in Finance P&L
    Auto-create invoice on harvest
    Each harvest creates a Draft invoice in Finance → Sale Invoices
    💰 FEED PRICE PER KG (₹)
    ★ 4.0mm and 6.0mm are the primary grow-out sizes.
    Sync unprocessed entries to Finance.
    🕸 NET CLEANING SCHEDULE

    Log net cleaning per cage. App alerts when cleaning is overdue (default: every 21 days).

    📲 INSTALL APP

    Install AquaFin as a standalone app on your device for the full offline experience.

    Works offline · Syncs automatically · No app store needed
    ✅ AquaFin is already installed or running as a standalone app.
    🧪 ADDITIVE CONFIGURATION

    Manage additive names, units, cost, and dosage per kg of feed. Dosage auto-calculates mixing quantities in the Feed Plan.

    💊 TREATMENT CONFIGURATION

    Custom treatment types that appear in the dropdown when logging treatments.

    🏥 DRUG / PRODUCT LIBRARY

    Saved drugs with default dose, unit, and cost. Select from dropdown when logging treatments instead of typing each time.

    ✅ AI Connected
    🤖
    Vanakkam! I'm AquaFin AI, your farm assistant for Bells Aquaculture. I have live access to your cage data, water quality, feed logs, and harvest records.

    Ask me anything about your farm — or tap a suggestion above to get started.
    🚨 EMERGENCY TRANSFER — CAGE
    Transfer fish from source cage into this emergency cage
